## Summary

-

## Scope

- [ ] Public docs
- [ ] Templates or examples
- [ ] Package metadata
- [ ] CLI or validation
- [ ] CI

## Dex Agent Boundary

- [ ] Runtime changes remain outside this repository.
- [ ] No hooks, automatic memory writes, or V2 scripts are promised unless implemented.
- [ ] Version references remain aligned with `0.1.2` or this PR updates the version intentionally.

## Safety

- [ ] No secrets, tokens, real chat IDs, private `.agents/` data, logs, screenshots, or local runtime state.
- [ ] Examples are sanitized.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] `npm run doctor`
- [ ] `npm run pack:check`
